stdin_pipe_fix_details: execSync with input: prompt replaces old --file flag approach
dry_run_results: All daemon logic (inbox scanning, dedup, priority sorting, round tracking, error counter, stall detection) works correctly in dry-run mode
live_mode_risk_assessment: HIGH — daemon targets 4 production lane directories with --auto flag (no permission prompts)
recommendation: Dry-run verification sufficient for ACT task. Stdin pipe fix can be verified independently via: echo "prompt" | kilo run --auto --dir <dir> --format json

historical_failures.cause: --file flag used for prompt text instead of stdin pipe
